description: A customer does not understand the charges on their most recent bill, which includes a policy change prorated amount.

nodes.task_description: Identify the customer and retrieve their latest billing statement.

expected_outcome.value: Agent pulls up the statement in question.

nodes.task_description: Review the statement and the customer's recent policy changes.

expected_outcome.value: Agent sees the customer recently added a new car, which triggered a prorated premium charge.

nodes.task_description: Clearly walk the customer through the statement, explaining each line item and how the prorated charge was calculated.

expected_outcome.value: Agent successfully explains the bill to the customer's satisfaction.
